task: Fix PR #9 review findings for Platform Milestone B
completed: Enforced lifecycle ownership in TaskService startTask/completeTask/failTask using calling API key agent identity (ownerId)
Changed agent assignment mismatch on lifecycle transitions to ForbiddenError (403)
Removed invalid state machine transition running -> awaiting_approval
Added heartbeat grace period support in AgentService enforceHeartbeatTimeouts with env-configurable HEARTBEAT_GRACE_PERIOD_MS (default 300000)
Prevented immediate task failure on first heartbeat miss; fail happens only after grace deadline
Added integration regression test for IDOR: agent B cannot complete task assigned to agent A (403)
Added integration test for A→B→C dependency cascade readiness progression
Updated heartbeat integration test to verify no immediate failure, then failure after grace
Updated unit state machine tests for removed transition
Verified quality gates: pnpm test and pnpm lint pass
Committed and pushed fixes to feature/milestone-b
